behavior_in_tests.reason: All four behaviors (WS timeout, no verbose log, safe docker cleanup, correct bazel target) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments for Gates, pass_to_pass, and fail_to_pass with descriptive docstrings.
